mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, MAC_TYPE_CODE, MAC_MODEL_CODE, DEPT_ID, IMEI, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, MAC_MODEL_NAME, MAC_TYPE_NAME, IS_ELECTRON_FENCE FROM M_MACHINE WHERE STATUS = '1' and IMEI = #{imei} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT DISTINCT B.WORK_PLAN_ID "workPlanId" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY B, T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A WHERE A.WORK_DATE = TO_DATE (#{workDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.CLASS_CODE = #{classCode} AND (A.PLAN_TYPE = '2' OR A.PLAN_TYPE = '1') AND A.ID = b.WORK_PLAN_ID AND B.EQUIPMENT_NO = #{macCode}

SELECT A.ID ID, TEMP_T1.MASS_NAME MASS_NAMES_SOURCE, TEMP_T2.CARGO_NAME, TEMP_T2.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TEMP_T2.SCN SCN, TEMP_T2.SHIP_NAME SHIP_NAME, T1.POUND_REMARK POUND_REMARK, T1.TRUST_NO TRUST_NO FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(MASS_NAME), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY WORK_PLAN_ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) MASS_NAME, WORK_PLAN_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION WHERE MASS_NAME IS NOT NULL GROUP BY WORK_PLAN_ID ) TEMP_T1 ON TEMP_T1.WORK_PLAN_ID = A . ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(A2.CARGO_NAME), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.TRUST_ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) CARGO_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR (A2.CARGO_OWNER_NAME), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.TRUST_ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) CARGO_OWNER_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR (A4.SHIP_NAME), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.TRUST_ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) SHIP_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR (A4.SCN), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.TRUST_ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) SCN, A1.TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A1, T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A2, T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM A3, T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A4 WHERE A1.CARGO_INFO_ID = A2. ID AND A2.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = A3.ID AND A3.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = A4.ID GROUP BY A1.TRUST_ID ) TEMP_T2 ON TEMP_T2.TRUST_ID = A .TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST T1 ON T1. ID = A .TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM F ON T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = F. ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON F.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS. ID WHERE A.ID IN
#{workPlanId}

SELECT DISTINCT t2.BUSINESS_NO "businessNo" FROM T_BUS_TRUST t1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO t2 ON t1. ID = t2.TRUST_ID WHERE t2.CARGO_INFO_ID IN ( SELECT A1.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A1 WHERE A1.TRUST_ID = #{trustId} ) AND t1. TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港', '疏港')
SELECT PP.PORT_CODE,COUNT(1) AS NUM FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND PP WHERE PP.IS_FINISHED = 0 AND PP.INV_NO IS NOT NULL AND PP.PORT_CODE IN ('01','02','03') GROUP BY PP.PORT_CODE

SELECT T2.STACK_ID, T2.STACK_CODE, T2.STACK_NAME, T2.POSITION, T2.POSITION_FROM, T1.POSITION_TIME FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID STACK_ID, MAX (POSITION_TIME) POSITION_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY STACK_ID ORDER BY STACK_ID ) T1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION T2 ON T1.STACK_ID = T2.STACK_ID AND T1.POSITION_TIME = T2.POSITION_TIME

SELECT T2.STACK_ID, T2.STACK_CODE, T2.STACK_NAME, T2.POSITION, T2.POSITION_FROM, T1.POSITION_TIME, T4.ID REGION_ID, T4.STORAGE_YARD_NM REGION_NAME, T5.ID STOREHOUSE_ID, T5.STORAGE_YARD_NM STOREHOUSE_NAME FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID STACK_ID, MAX (POSITION_TIME) POSITION_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY STACK_ID ) T1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION T2 ON T1.STACK_ID = T2.STACK_ID AND T1.POSITION_TIME = T2.POSITION_TIME LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD T3 ON T3. ID = T1.STACK_ID LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD T4 ON T3.Parent_id = T4. ID AND T4.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD T5 ON T4.Parent_id = T5. ID AND T5.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' WHERE T1.STACK_ID IN
#{item.massId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, PLAN_TYPE, RESERVAT_CAR_ID, CAR_NO, DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID, MAC_ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, WORK_TIME_START, WORK_TIME_END, REMARK, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID FROM T_MAC_WORK_TIME
AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL
AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL
AND DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID = #{dispatchSecondaryId} AND MAC_ID = #{macId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL
AND DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID = #{dispatchSecondaryId} AND MAC_ID = #{macId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL
SELECT count(*) FROM T_MAC_WORK_TIME where MAC_ID = #{macId} and WORK_TIME_END is null

SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, PLAN_TYPE, RESERVAT_CAR_ID, CAR_NO, DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID, MAC_ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, WORK_TIME_START, WORK_TIME_END, REMARK, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME FROM T_MAC_WORK_TIME
AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId} AND WORK_TIME_START IS NOT NULL AND WORK_TIME_END IS NOT NULL
AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId} AND WORK_TIME_START IS NOT NULL AND WORK_TIME_END IS NOT NULL
AND DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID = #{dispatchSecondaryId} AND MAC_ID = #{macId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL
AND DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID = #{dispatchSecondaryId} AND MAC_ID = #{macId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL

SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, PLAN_TYPE, RESERVAT_CAR_ID, CAR_NO, DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID, MAC_ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, WORK_TIME_START, WORK_TIME_END, REMARK, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME FROM T_MAC_WORK_TIME
AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL AND WORK_TIME_START IS NOT NULL
AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL AND WORK_TIME_START IS NOT NULL
AND DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID = #{dispatchSecondaryId} AND MAC_ID = #{macId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL AND WORK_TIME_START IS NOT NULL
AND DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID = #{dispatchSecondaryId} AND MAC_ID = #{macId} AND WORK_TIME_END IS NULL AND WORK_TIME_START IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_MAC_WORK_TIME( ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, PLAN_TYPE, RESERVAT_CAR_ID, CAR_NO, DISPATCH_SECONDARY_ID, MAC_ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, WORK_TIME_START, WORK_TIME_END, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservatCarId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{carNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchSecondaryId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{macId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{macCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workTimeStart, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workTimeEnd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{weighbridgeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storehouseName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{massId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{massName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, CAR_NO, DRIVER_NAME, DRIVER_ID_CARD, DRIVER_PHONE FROM T_BUS_TRUST_TRADE_RESERVAT_CAR WHERE ID = #{id}
SELECT ID, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE ID = #{id}
SELECT NOTE_ID, TRUCK_PLATE, PLAN_NO, WORK_ERWEI_ID, TSPT_ID FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE NOTE_ID = #{noteId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_YARD_TALLY ( ID, PLAN_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, QUANTITY, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, OPERATORS_ID, OPERATORS_NAME, TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_ID, TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_NAME, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, PLAN_NO, TSPT_ID, WORK_ERWEI_ID ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{planId}, #{shipvoyageId}, #{processCode}, #{processName}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentNo}, #{transportEquipmentId}, #{transportEquipmentNo}, #{quantity}, #{ton}, #{remark}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operatorsId}, #{operatorsName}, #{transportOperatorsId}, #{transportOperatorsName}, #{weighbridgeId}, #{planNo}, #{tsptId}, #{workErWeiId} )

INSERT INTO T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM ( ID, TALLY_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, TRUST_CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, LOCATION_ID, LOCATION_NO, STACK_POSITION_NAME, STACK_POSITION_ID, DIRECT_FETCHING, SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tallyId}, #{cargoInfoId}, #{cargoCode}, #{cargoName}, #{quantity}, #{ton}, #{remark}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{trustCargoInfoId}, #{storehouseId}, #{storehouseName}, #{locationId}, #{locationNo}, #{stackPositionName}, #{stackPositionId}, #{directFetching}, #{sourceOrTargetFlag} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T .PROCESS_CD "processCode", T .PROCESS_NM "processName" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS T WHERE T .PARENT_ID = ( SELECT b."ID" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A, M_WORK_PROCESS b WHERE A .PROCESS_CODE = b.PROCESS_CD AND A ."ID" = #{workPlanId} ) ORDER BY T.SORT_NUM ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT PLAN_NO, COM_NAME SHIP_NAME, SCN, WEIGHT_SELF, INV_REM, GOODS_NAME FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE NOTE_ID = #{weighbridgeId}
SELECT PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = 'MAC_DISTANCE'
SELECT COUNt(*) FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId} and DEL_FLAG != 1
SELECT LOCATION FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND where NOTE_ID = #{weighbridgeId}
select ton from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE WHERE MASS_ID =#{massId} AND CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId}
select TBTC.ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID where TBT.TYPE ='集港' AND TBTC.ID = #{trustCargoInfoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_MAC_WORK_NOW ( ID, MAC_ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, STACK_ID, STACK_CODE, STACK_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{macId}, #{macCode}, #{macName}, #{remark}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stackId}, #{stackCode}, #{stackName}, #{workDate}, #{classCode} )
mapper.select: select TPPSD.* from T_YARD_TALLY TYT left join T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM TYTI on TYTI.TALLY_ID = TYT.ID left join T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD on TPPSD.CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID = TYTI.id where TPPSD.id is not null and TYT.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{noteId}

SELECT tpwp.TRUST_ID "trustId", tpwp.COMPANY_ID "companyId", tpwp.COMPANY_NAME "companyName", tpwp.WORK_DATE "workDate", tpwp.CLASS_CODE "classCode", tpwp.CLASS_NAME "className", tpwp.SHIPVOYAGE_ID "shipvoyageId", tpwp.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID "shipvoyageItemId", mwp.SOURCE_CD "sourceCd", mwp.SOURCE_NM "sourceNm", mwp.TARGET_CD "targetCd", mwp.TARGET_NM "targetNm", mwp.UPDATE_POINT "updatePoint", tpds.WORK_PLAN_ID "workPlanId", tpds.SUB_PROCESS_CODE "processCode", tpds.SUB_PROCESS_NAME "processName", TPDS.EQUIPMENT_ID "equipmentId", tpds.EQUIPMENT_NO "equipmentNo", mm.IMEI "imei", mm.MAC_CODE "macCode" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY tpds LEFT JOIN M_MACHINE mm ON mm.ID = TPDS.EQUIPMENT_ID LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON tpwp.id = tpds.WORK_PLAN_ID LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS mwp ON tpds.SUB_PROCESS_CODE = MWP.PROCESS_CD WHERE mm.IMEI = #{imei} AND WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}

SELECT TBTC.CARGO_OWNER_NAME || '/' || TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO || '/' || tbtc.cargo_name "text", TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID "value", tbtc.ID "trustCargoInfoId", TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", TBCI.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", TBCI.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", TBTC.CARGO_OWNER_ID "cargoOwnerId", TBTC.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", TBTC.PACKING_CODE "packingCode", TBTC.PACKING_NAME "packingName" FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO tbtc LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON TPWP.TRUST_ID = TBTC.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON TBCI.ID = TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE tpwp.id = #{workPlanId}

SELECT EQUIPMENT_ID "value", EQUIPMENT_NO "text", EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID , EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME , EQUIPMENT_ID "equipmentId", EQUIPMENT_NO "equipmentNo" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY tpds WHERE WORK_POSITION_CODE = '03' AND TPDS.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}

SELECT tpwp.ID "workPlanId", tpwpl.DIRECTION "direction", tbci.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", tbci.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", tbci.ID "cargoInfoId", tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", tbci.PACKING_CODE "packingCode", tbci.PACKING_NAME "packingName", tbci.CARGO_OWNER_ID "cargoOwnerId", tbci.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", tpps.STOREHOUSE_ID "storehouseId", tpps.STOREHOUSE_NAME "storehouseName", tpps.REGION_ID "locationId", tpps.REGION_NAME "locationNo", tpps.MASS_ID "stackPositionId", tpps.MASS_NAME "stackPositionName", CASE WHEN tpwpl.DIRECTION = '2' THEN 0 ELSE tpps.QUANTITY END "quantitySurplus", CASE WHEN tpwpl.DIRECTION = '2' THEN 0 ELSE tpps.TON END "tonSurplus", '1' "sourceOrTargetFlag", tpps.STOREHOUSE_NAME || '/' || tpps.REGION_NAME || '/' || tpps.MASS_NAME "text" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION tpwpl INNER JOIN T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE tpps ON tpps.MASS_ID = tpwpl.MASS_ID LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON TPWPL.WORK_PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON tbci.id = tpps.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE tpwpl.DIRECTION = #{direction} AND tpps.CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' AND tpps.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId} AND TPWPL.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}

SELECT tpwp.ID "workPlanId", tpwpl.DIRECTION "direction", tbci.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", tbci.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", tbci.ID "cargoInfoId", tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", tbci.PACKING_CODE "packingCode", tbci.PACKING_NAME "packingName", tbci.CARGO_OWNER_ID "cargoOwnerId", tbci.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", tpwpl.STOREHOUSE_ID "storehouseId", tpwpl.STOREHOUSE_NAME "storehouseName", tpwpl.REGION_ID "locationId", tpwpl.REGION_NAME "locationNo", tpwpl.MASS_ID "value", tpwpl.MASS_ID "stackPositionId", tpwpl.MASS_NAME "stackPositionName", tpwpl.STOREHOUSE_NAME || '/' || tpwpl.REGION_NAME || '/' || tpwpl.MASS_NAME "text" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION tpwpl LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON TPWPL.WORK_PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO tbtc ON tbtc.TRUST_ID = TPWP.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON tbci.id = tbtc.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE tpwpl.DIRECTION = #{direction} AND tbci.ID = #{cargoInfoId} AND TPWPL.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}

SELECT tyt.PLAN_ID "workPlanId", tyti.TALLY_ID "tallyId", tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", tyti.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", tyt.PROCESS_NAME "processName", tyt.EQUIPMENT_NO "equipmentNo", tyt.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO "transportEquipmentNo", tyt.DEPT_NAME "deptName", max(CASE WHEN tyti.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG = 1 THEN tyti.STOREHOUSE_NAME || '/' || tyti.LOCATION_NO || '/' || tyti.STACK_POSITION_NAME END) "sourceMassName", max(CASE WHEN tyti.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG = 1 THEN tyti.TON END) "sourceTon", max(CASE WHEN tyti.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG = 2 THEN tyti.STOREHOUSE_NAME || '/' || tyti.LOCATION_NO || '/' || tyti.STACK_POSITION_NAME END) "targetMassName", max(CASE WHEN tyti.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG = 2 THEN tyti.TON END) "targetTon" FROM T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM tyti LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY tyt ON TYT.ID = TYTI.TALLY_ID LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON TYT.PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON TYTI.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID WHERE tyt.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND tpwp.TRUST_ID = #{trustId} AND tpwp.WORK_DATE = TO_DATE(#{workDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND tpwp.CLASS_CODE = #{classCode} GROUP BY tyti.TALLY_ID,tyt.PROCESS_NAME ,tyt.EQUIPMENT_NO ,TYT.DEPT_NAME,tyt.PLAN_ID,tyti.CARGO_NAME,tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO,tyt.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO ORDER BY max(tyt.CREATE_TIME) DESC

SELECT SUM(tyt.ton) "ton" FROM T_YARD_TALLY tyt LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON TYT.PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID WHERE tyt.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND tpwp.TRUST_ID = #{trustId} AND tpwp.WORK_DATE = TO_DATE(#{workDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND tpwp.CLASS_CODE = #{classCode} ORDER BY tyt.CREATE_TIME
mapper.update: update T_YARD_TALLY set DEL_FLAG = '1' where WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{noteId}
mapper.select: SELECT ID "portStorageDetailId", PORT_STORAGE_ID "portStorageId", QUANTITY "quantity", TON "ton" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL tppsd WHERE CARGO_TALLY_ID = #{tallyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
select mwp.IS_DIRECT_ACCESS from T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP join M_WORK_PROCESS MWP on TPWP.PROCESS_CODE = MWP.PROCESS_CD where tpwp.id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
